title: Cuneiform Tablet #0200: Ur III Administrative
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a administrative document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a administrative document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Administrative document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records administrative matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
